title: Fix Circuit Breaker Cascade Logic
author: kublai
problem: Circuit breaker quarantine logic is redistributing failed ops tasks to the wrong agent (temujin) repeatedly, creating an infinite failure loop that wastes compute and floods queues. Git anomaly alert (commit 6969fe48) triggered 8+ cascade failures over 2 hours, representing 80% of all failed tasks in last 24h.
solution: Add domain-aware redispatch (ops tasks stay in ogedei), deduplication check (skip if similar task recently failed), max-redispatch limit (escalate after 3 attempts), and exponential backoff (1m → 5m → 15m delays). Implement in agent-task-handler.py circuit breaker logic.
expected_impact: Eliminate 80% of failed tasks, reduce temujin queue flooding, ensure domain correctness, prevent infinite loops, improve response times.

implementation_phases.task: Add escalation to kublai on max limit

success_criteria: Zero circuit breaker cascade loops in 48h post-deployment
No ops tasks routed to temujin
All max-redispatch tasks escalated to kublai
rollback_plan: Revert circuit breaker logic to previous version, kill executing redispatched tasks, escalate stuck tasks to kublai manually. Revert time <5 minutes.
